narration: What if I told you your kidneys play a secret role in your blood pressure?
visual_description: Hook visual: What if I told you your kidneys play a secret role in your blood pressure?

narration: Meet the renin-angiotensin system, a critical player in regulating blood flow and pressure.
visual_description: Context visual: Meet the renin-angiotensin system, a critical player in regulating blood flow and pressure.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Meet the renin-angiotensin system, a critical player in regulating blood flow and pressure.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Meet the renin-angiotensin system, a critical player in regulating blood flow and pressure.

narration: When blood pressure drops, kidneys release renin, triggering a cascade of reactions.
visual_description: Escalation visual: When blood pressure drops, kidneys release renin, triggering a cascade of reactions.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: When blood pressure drops, kidneys release renin, triggering a cascade of reactions.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: When blood pressure drops, kidneys release renin, triggering a cascade of reactions.

narration: This process produces angiotensin, which narrows blood vessels and raises pressure.
visual_description: Evidence visual: This process produces angiotensin, which narrows blood vessels and raises pressure.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: This process produces angiotensin, which narrows blood vessels and raises pressure.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: This process produces angiotensin, which narrows blood vessels and raises pressure.

narration: Understanding this system may help manage conditions like hypertension, but it’s complex.
